package.name: welding_seam_skill
package.description:
"Execute weld seam" skill with simulation and hardware modes. Lifecycle action server for executing a Cartesian weld trajectory. Simulation mode (use_simulation:=true): 6 s mock with IGNITING → WELDING × 3 → FINISHING phases. Hardware mode (use_simulation:=false): delegates to /weld_experiment on RobinPlanner (robin_moveit_control), which sequences MoveItPy PTP/LIN motions + WeldingCoordinator arc. Also handles START_PROCESS intent (routed by the supervisor).
ros4hri compliance: conceptually implements motion_skills/ExecuteCartesianTrajectory.
